description_long: This is an ornate, rectangular serving tray with elaborately decorated edges and two large, integrated handles on opposite sides. The tray is made of a silvery metal, likely silver or silver-plated, and features a highly reflective, glossy surface. The rim is raised and scalloped, adorned with intricate floral and scrollwork patterns that give it a classic, antique appearance. The handles are openwork, oval-shaped, and seamlessly blend into the decorative rim. The central surface of the tray is flat and spacious, suitable for carrying multiple items. No visible brand logo or maker's mark is present on the tray.
description: An ornate, silver-colored serving tray with decorative scalloped edges and two large, integrated handles. The surface is highly reflective and adorned with intricate patterns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the tray, highlighting both ornate handles and the symmetrical decorative rim.
description_view_1: Angled view emphasizing the depth of the tray, the raised scalloped rim, and the detailed handle on the near side.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying both handles and the elaborate edge design.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, again showing the raised rim and the handle, with decorative details visible along the edge.
attribute_handles: Two large, oval-shaped openwork handles, one on each short side, integrated into the rim and made of the same metal as the tray.
attribute_rim_design: Raised, scalloped rim with moderate height and thickness, featuring ornate floral and scrollwork decorations along the entire edge.
attribute_decorative_patterns: Intricate floral and scrollwork motifs cover the rim and handles, with the central surface mostly plain and highly polished.
attribute_reflective_properties: The surface is highly glossy and mirror-like, producing strong reflections and highlights, especially on the flat central area. The decorative rim and handles also reflect light but with more diffuse highlights due to their textured patterns.
